hooks.command: DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}/.claude"; mkdir -p "$DIR"; P=$(jq -r '.prompt // ""'); NAME=$(printf '%s' "$P" | sed -nE 's#^[[:space:]]*/([A-Za-z0-9_-]+).*#\1#p'); if [ -n "$NAME" ] && [ -d "$DIR/skills/$NAME" ]; then printf '%s\t%s\n' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S')" "$NAME" >> "$DIR/skill-usage.log"; fi; exit 0
